top_signals.title: Uganda Confirms Three More Ebola Cases as Outbreak Spreads
top_signals.summary: Uganda confirmed three new Ebola cases, including a health worker and a driver linked to the country’s first known infection, as authorities race to contain the outbreak. Bloomberg News Senior Editor Jason Gale joined David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
